title: Pan-Seared Roast Crostini
description: A simple appetizer made with roasted bread and topped with melted cheese and fresh herbs. Perfect for snacking or as a light meal.
instructions: 2. Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick rounds.
3. Brush the bread slices with olive oil and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
4. Top each bread slice with a round of mozzarella cheese.
5. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped basil.
